raw_text:
ERROR   [TC-C-001] interface.f90:6 <-> header.h:2  param[1] 'n'
  VALUE_MISMATCH: Fortran 'n' lacks VALUE attribute (pass-by-reference).
  C prototype passes 'int n' by value. Fortran will dereference the integer
  value 'n' as a memory address. Immediate segfault on access.

ERROR   [TC-C-001] interface.f90:7 <-> header.h:2  param[2] 'alpha'
  VALUE_MISMATCH: Fortran 'alpha' lacks VALUE attribute. C passes 'double'
  by value (8 bytes in XMM0). Fortran dereferences XMM0 as pointer.
